description: Packy McCormick discusses his journey in crypto investing, including his experiences with Bitcoin and Coinbase, and shares insights on the evolving landscape of cryptocurrency and its intersection with traditional finance.
topic_summary: In this episode, Packy McCormick reflects on his investment strategies and the future of crypto, emphasizing the importance of community and technology in shaping the industry. He also touches on the challenges and opportunities presented by decentralized finance and the role of platforms in customer acquisition [t=699.72].
